text:
The Tumblorkians are a blobby, four-eyed slime alien race that exist in the world of Rick and Morty. The species originates from the planet Plopstar

At one point a huge group of Tumblorkians held a protest with Shrimply Pibbles.

*"Mortynight Run"
*"The Wedding Squanchers"
*"Vindicators 3: The Return of Worldender"
